Off Calendar May-03-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF DANIEL HOWLE's Motion To Amend The Complaint Naming The Does 1,2,3 For The True Names Of Defendants is granted pursuant to CCP 474. The Court continues the trial date to December 9, 2013. ORDER SIGNED AFTER HEARING. Judge: Peter Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
